name: prefix_baseline
description: Shared-prefix dataset, prefix caching OFF. Control group for measuring prefix caching benefit.

name: prefix_caching_on
description: Shared-prefix dataset, prefix caching ON. Shows KV block reuse across requests with common system prompts.

name: prefix_chunked_plus_cache
description: Shared-prefix dataset, both chunked prefill + prefix caching ON. Full optimization with prefix reuse.
